title: Manila, Metro Manila — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Manila is a city in Metro Manila with a population of 1,846,000. The Philippines’ historic capital and cultural heart, a bustling metropolis where centuries-old churches meet modern skyscrapers.
